title: ⚡🚀 SALES TRAINEE – FRESH GRADUATES & ORD 🚀
description:
Entry Level | Training Provided | Performance-Based | Uncapped Earnings

🎓 JUST GRADUATED OR JUST ORD?

Not sure where to start your career?

Don’t want a job that limits your income and growth from day one?

This role is designed to help you:

Build real-world skills

Gain confidence and exposure

Earn based on performance, not time served

Progress faster than traditional jobs

👥 WHO SHOULD APPLY

This opportunity is open to:

Fresh graduates from any discipline

ORD personnel entering the workforce

Individuals with little or no working experience

👉 No sales background required.

👉 Full training is provided.

💼 WHAT YOU WILL LEARN & DO

You will be trained to:

Communicate confidently with different people

Understand customer needs and recommend solutions

Present products professionally

Handle objections and follow up effectively

Work towards clear performance targets

These are transferable skills useful in any future career.

🎓 TRAINING & DEVELOPMENT

We provide:

Structured onboarding program

Step-by-step sales and communication training

Coaching from experienced leaders

Continuous feedback for improvement

👉 You are not expected to be perfect — only willing to learn.

💰 INCOME & REWARDS

Performance-based commissions

Uncapped earning potential

High performers earn more

Incentives and recognition for results

Your income grows as your skills and confidence grow.

📈 CAREER PROGRESSION

Clear advancement pathway:

Sales Trainee

Sales Executive

Senior Sales

Team Leader

Management roles

Promotions are based on results and attitude, not years worked.

✈️ TRAVEL & INCENTIVES

Local and overseas travel opportunities

Incentive trips for top performers

Exposure beyond desk-bound work

All rewards are earned through performance.

🎉 TEAM CULTURE

Supportive and energetic environment

Team nights and bonding sessions

Recognition for improvement and success

Leaders who mentor and guide

You won’t be doing this alone.

🚫 THIS ROLE MAY NOT SUIT YOU IF

You prefer fixed salary and routine work

You avoid performance-based roles

You dislike challenges or accountability

👉 CALL TO ACTION

🔥 If you’re ready to start your career strong:

👉 DM “START” or apply now

👉 Limited training slots available

Your first job can shape your future.

Choose wisely.

postedCompany.description:
We are a business firm that specialises in direct recruiting for global clients from SMEs to MNCs. 


We are looking for professionals in the Sales and Marketing industry.
postedCompany.name: ZEROTHREE PTE. LTD.
